title: [architect] Define platform lanes and per-repo required check policy
objective: Create explicit Linux, Windows, and macOS/platform-specific PR repair lane policy plus a per-repo required-vs-advisory check map so verifier and supervisor can route platform failures correctly and avoid merging red required checks.
acceptance_criteria: A committed policy artifact lists required and advisory checks per high-priority repo or explains how they are discovered from GitHub branch protection.
Windows-only, macOS-only, Linux integration, and repeated cross-platform failures have distinct classifications and lane naming rules.
Verifier policy says red required checks block merge; advisory/non-required reds require explicit documented rationale before merge.
Platform lane prompts include OS-specific reproducer/log commands and fallback behavior when local reproduction is unavailable.

source_gap_audit.reason: Expanded from .handoff/.idea intent after the initial TASK-PRR set proved too broad.
